items.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
items.summary: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express, Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: More phone cameras should come with silly telephoto lenses
items.summary: Upgrading your phone with a camera grip attachment is one thing. But doll-sized telephoto lenses that you mount on top of the rear camera? C'mon. I wrote the Vivo X300 off as a...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.summary: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
